title: 8 herbal remedies for cancer survivors with osteoporosis
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra tinctures have been traditionally used to help alleviate symptoms of osteoporosis. This is due to the presence of glycyrrhizin, a compound found in licorice root, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Glycyrrhizin can help reduce the production of cortisol, a hormone that can lead to bone loss and osteoporosis.
